full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Structuring the Part B report (summary, gap, ablation, failure mode, reflection)

full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked against rubric requirements for report.pdf.

top_5_prompts.prompt: How do I structure the Part B report with Paper Summary, Reproduction Gap, Ablation, Failure Mode, and Reflection?
What should the one-paragraph paper summary for Yu & Joachims 2009 include (CCCP, latent variables)?
How do I honestly discuss the gap between toy P@5 and the paper's Table 3 (0.567)?
What length limit should the report have (e.g. 4 pages)?
How do I export report.md to report.pdf for submission?

student_declaration.statement: I declare that this JSON file contains a complete and honest record of my LLM usage for Part B.
